1.tag: At ang buong karamihan ng mga tao ay nagsisipanalangin sa labas sa oras ng kamangyan.

1.eng: And there appeared unto him an angel of the Lord standing on the right side of the altar of incense.
1.tag: At napakita sa kaniya ang isang anghel ng Panginoon, na nakatayo sa dakong kanan ng dambana ng kamangyan.

1.eng: And when Zacharias saw him , he was troubled, and fear fell upon him.
1.tag: At nagulumihanan si Zacarias, pagkakita niya sa kaniya, at dinatnan siya ng takot.

1.eng: But the angel said unto him, Fear not, Zacharias: for thy prayer is heard; and thy wife Elisabeth shall bear thee a son, and thou shalt call his name John.
1.tag: Datapuwa't sinabi sa kaniya ng anghel, Huwag kang matakot, Zacarias: sapagka't dininig ang daing mo, at ang asawa mong si Elisabet ay manganganak sa iyo ng isang anak na lalake, at tatawagin mong Juan ang kaniyang pangalan.

1.eng: And thou shalt have joy and gladness; and many shall rejoice at his birth.
1.tag: At magkakaroon ka ng ligaya at galak; at marami ang maliligaya sa pagkapanganak sa kaniya.

1.eng: For he shall be great in the sight of the Lord, and shall drink neither wine nor strong drink; and he shall be filled with the Holy Ghost, even from his mother's womb.
1.tag: Sapagka't siya'y magiging dakila sa paningin ng Panginoon, at siya'y hindi iinom ng alak ni matapang na inumin; at siya'y mapupuspos ng Espiritu Santo, mula pa sa tiyan ng kaniyang ina.

1.eng: And many of the children of Israel shall he turn to the Lord their God.
1.tag: At marami sa mga anak ni Israel, ay papagbabaliking-loob niya sa Panginoon na kanilang Dios.

1.eng: And he shall go before him in the spirit and power of Elias, to turn the hearts of the fathers to the children, and the disobedient to the wisdom of the just; to make ready a people prepared for the Lord.
1.tag: At siya'y lalakad sa unahan ng kaniyang mukha na may espiritu at kapangyarihan ni Elias, upang papagbaliking-loob ang mga puso ng mga ama sa mga anak, at ang mga suwail ay magsilakad sa karunungan ng mga matuwid, upang ipaglaan ang Panginoon ng isang bayang nahahanda.

1.eng: And Zacharias said unto the angel, Whereby shall I know this? for I am an old man, and my wife well stricken in years.
1.tag: At sinabi ni Zacarias sa anghel, Sa ano malalaman ko ito? sapagka't ako'y matanda na, at ang aking asawa ay may pataw ng maraming taon.

1.eng: And the angel answering said unto him, I am Gabriel, that stand in the presence of God; and am sent to speak unto thee, and to shew thee these glad tidings.
1.tag: At pagsagot ng anghel ay sinabi sa kaniya, Ako'y si Gabriel, na nananayo sa harapan ng Dios; at ako'y sinugo upang makipagusap sa iyo, at magdala sa iyo nitong mabubuting balita.

1.eng: And, behold, thou shalt be dumb, and not able to speak, until the day that these things shall be performed, because thou believest not my words, which shall be fulfilled in their season.
1.tag: At narito, mapipipi ka at hindi ka makapangungusap, hanggang sa araw na mangyari ang mga bagay na ito, sapagka't hindi ka sumampalataya sa aking mga salita, na magaganap sa kanilang kapanahunan.

1.eng: And the people waited for Zacharias, and marvelled that he tarried so long in the temple.
1.tag: At hinihintay ng bayan si Zacarias, at nanganggigilalas sila sa kaniyang pagluluwat sa loob ng templo.

1.eng: And when he came out, he could not speak unto them: and they perceived that he had seen a vision in the temple: for he beckoned unto them, and remained speechless.
1.tag: At nang lumabas siya, ay hindi siya makapagsalita sa kanila: at hininagap nila na siya'y nakakita ng isang pangitain sa templo: at siya'y nagpatuloy ng pakikipagusap sa kanila, sa pamamagitan ng mga hudyat, at nanatiling pipi.

1.eng: And it came to pass, that, as soon as the days of his ministration were accomplished, he departed to his own house.
1.tag: At nangyari, na nang maganap na ang mga araw ng kaniyang paglilingkod, siya'y umuwi sa kaniyang bahay.

1.eng: And after those days his wife Elisabeth conceived, and hid herself five months, saying,
1.tag: At pagkatapos ng mga araw na ito ay naglihi ang kaniyang asawang si Elisabet; at siya'y lumigpit ng limang buwan, na nagsasabi.

1.eng: Thus hath the Lord dealt with me in the days wherein he looked on me , to take away my reproach among men.
1.tag: Ganito ang ginawa ng Panginoon sa akin sa mga araw nang ako'y tingnan niya, upang alisin ang aking pagkaduwahagi sa gitna ng mga tao.

1.eng: And in the sixth month the angel Gabriel was sent from God unto a city of Galilee, named Nazareth,
1.tag: Nang ikaanim na buwan nga'y sinugo ng Dios ang anghel Gabriel sa isang bayan ng Galilea, ngala'y Nazaret.

1.eng: To a virgin espoused to a man whose name was Joseph, of the house of David; and the virgin's name was Mary.
1.tag: Sa isang dalagang magaasawa sa isang lalake, na ang kaniyang ngala'y Jose, sa angkan ni David; at Maria ang pangalan ng dalaga.

1.eng: And the angel came in unto her, and said, Hail, thou that art highly favoured, the Lord is with thee: blessed art thou among women.
1.tag: At pumasok siya sa kinaroroonan niya, at sinabi, Magalak ka, ikaw na totoong pinakamamahal, ang Panginoon ay sumasa iyo.

1.eng: And when she saw him , she was troubled at his saying, and cast in her mind what manner of salutation this should be.
1.tag: Datapuwa't siya'y totoong nagulumihanan sa sabing ito, at iniisip sa kaniyang sarili kung anong bati kaya ito.

1.eng: And the angel said unto her, Fear not, Mary: for thou hast found favour with God.
1.tag: At sinabi sa kaniya ng anghel, Huwag kang matakot, Maria: sapagka't nakasumpong ka ng biyaya sa Dios.

1.eng: And, behold, thou shalt conceive in thy womb, and bring forth a son, and shalt call his name JESUS.
1.tag: At narito, maglilihi ka sa iyong tiyan, at manganganak ka ng isang lalake, at tatawagin mo ang kaniyang pangalang JESUS.

1.eng: He shall be great, and shall be called the Son of the Highest: and the Lord God shall give unto him the throne of his father David:
1.tag: Siya'y magiging dakila, at tatawaging Anak ng Kataastaasan: at sa kaniya'y ibibigay ng Panginoong Dios ang luklukan ni David na kaniyang ama.

1.eng: And he shall reign over the house of Jacob for ever; and of his kingdom there shall be no end.
1.tag: At siya'y maghahari sa angkan ni Jacob magpakailan man; at hindi magkakawakas ang kaniyang kaharian.

1.eng: Then said Mary unto the angel, How shall this be, seeing I know not a man?
1.tag: At sinabi ni Maria sa anghel, Paanong mangyayari ito, sa ako'y hindi nakakakilala ng lalake.

1.eng: And the angel answered and said unto her, The Holy Ghost shall come upon thee, and the power of the Highest shall overshadow thee: therefore also that holy thing which shall be born of thee shall be called the Son of God.
1.tag: At sumagot ang anghel, at sinabi sa kaniya, Bababa sa iyo ang Espiritu Santo, at lililiman ka ng kapangyarihan ng Kataastaasan: kaya naman ang banal na bagay na ipanganganak ay tatawaging Anak ng Dios.

1.eng: And, behold, thy cousin Elisabeth, she hath also conceived a son in her old age: and this is the sixth month with her, who was called barren.
1.tag: At narito, si Elisabet na iyong kamaganak, ay naglihi rin naman ng isang anak na lalake sa kaniyang katandaan; at ito ang ikaanim na buwan niya, na dati'y tinatawag na baog.

1.eng: For with God nothing shall be impossible.
1.tag: Sapagka't walang salitang mula sa Dios na di may kapangyarihan.

1.eng: And Mary said, Behold the handmaid of the Lord; be it unto me according to thy word. And the angel departed from her.
1.tag: At sinabi ni Maria, Narito, ang alipin ng Panginoon; mangyari sa akin ang ayon sa iyong salita. At iniwan siya ng anghel.

1.eng: And Mary arose in those days, and went into the hill country with haste, into a city of Juda;
1.tag: At nang mga araw na ito'y nagtindig si Maria, at nagmadaling napasa lupaing maburol, sa isang bayan ng Juda.

1.eng: And entered into the house of Zacharias, and saluted Elisabeth.
1.tag: At pumasok sa bahay ni Zacarias at bumati kay Elisabet.

1.eng: And it came to pass, that, when Elisabeth heard the salutation of Mary, the babe leaped in her womb; and Elisabeth was filled with the Holy Ghost:
1.tag: At nangyari, pagkarinig ni Elisabet ng bati ni Maria, ay lumukso ang sanggol sa kaniyang tiyan; at napuspos si Elisabet ng Espiritu Santo.

1.eng: And she spake out with a loud voice, and said, Blessed art thou among women, and blessed is the fruit of thy womb.
1.tag: At sumigaw siya ng malakas na tinig, at sinabi, Pinagpala ka sa mga babae, at pinagpala ang bunga ng iyong tiyan.

1.eng: And whence is this to me, that the mother of my Lord should come to me?
1.tag: At ano't nangyari sa akin, na ang ina ng aking Panginoon ay pumarito sa akin.

1.eng: For, lo, as soon as the voice of thy salutation sounded in mine ears, the babe leaped in my womb for joy.
1.tag: Sapagka't ganito, pagdating sa aking mga pakinig ng tinig ng iyong bati, lumukso sa tuwa ang sanggol sa aking tiyan.

1.eng: And blessed is she that believed: for there shall be a performance of those things which were told her from the Lord.
1.tag: At mapalad ang babaing sumampalataya; sapagka't matutupad ang mga bagay na sa kaniya'y sinabi ng Panginoon.

1.eng: And Mary said, My soul doth magnify the Lord,
1.tag: At sinabi ni Maria, Dinadakila ng aking kaluluwa ang Panginoon.

1.eng: And my spirit hath rejoiced in God my Saviour.
1.tag: At nagalak ang aking espiritu sa Dios na aking Tagapagligtas.

1.eng: For he hath regarded the low estate of his handmaiden: for, behold, from henceforth all generations shall call me blessed.
1.tag: Sapagka't nilingap niya ang kababaan ng kaniyang alipin. Sapagka't, narito, mula ngayon ay tatawagin akong mapalad ng lahat ng maghahalihaliling lahi.

1.eng: For he that is mighty hath done to me great things; and holy is his name.
1.tag: Sapagka't ginawan ako ng Makapangyarihan ng mga dakilang bagay; At banal ang kaniyang pangalan.

1.eng: And his mercy is on them that fear him from generation to generation.
1.tag: At ang kaniyang awa ay sa mga lahi't lahi. Sa nangatatakot sa kaniya.

1.eng: He hath shewed strength with his arm; he hath scattered the proud in the imagination of their hearts.
1.tag: Siya'y nagpakita ng lakas ng kaniyang bisig; Isinambulat niya ang mga palalo sa paggunamgunam ng kanilang puso.

1.eng: He hath put down the mighty from their seats, and exalted them of low degree.
1.tag: Ibinaba niya ang mga prinsipe sa mga luklukan nila, At itinaas ang mga may mababang kalagayan.

1.eng: He hath filled the hungry with good things; and the rich he hath sent empty away.
1.tag: Binusog niya ang nangagugutom ng mabubuting bagay; At pinaalis niya ang mayayaman, na walang anoman.

1.eng: He hath holpen his servant Israel, in remembrance of his mercy;
1.tag: Tumulong siya sa Israel na kaniyang alipin, Upang maalaala niya ang aw.

1.eng: As he spake to our fathers, to Abraham, and to his seed for ever.
1.tag: (Gaya ng sinabi niya sa ating mga magulang) Kay Abraham at sa kaniyang binhi magpakailan man.

1.eng: And Mary abode with her about three months, and returned to her own house.
1.tag: At si Maria ay natirang kasama niya na may tatlong buwan, at umuwi sa kaniyang bahay.

1.eng: Now Elisabeth's full time came that she should be delivered; and she brought forth a son.
1.tag: Naganap nga kay Elisabet ang panahon ng panganganak; at siya'y nanganak ng isang lalake.

1.eng: And her neighbours and her cousins heard how the Lord had shewed great mercy upon her; and they rejoiced with her.
1.tag: At nabalitaan ng kaniyang mga kapitbahay at mga kamaganak, na dinakila ng Panginoon ang kaniyang awa sa kaniya; at sila'y nangakigalak sa kaniya.

1.eng: And it came to pass, that on the eighth day they came to circumcise the child; and they called him Zacharias, after the name of his father.
1.tag: At nangyari, na nang ikawalong araw ay nagsiparoon sila upang tuliin ang sanggol; at siya'y tatawagin sana nila na Zacarias, ayon sa pangalan ng kaniyang ama.

1.eng: And his mother answered and said, Not so ; but he shall be called John.
1.tag: At sumagot ang kaniyang ina at nagsabi, Hindi gayon; kundi ang itatawag sa kaniya'y Juan.

1.eng: And they said unto her, There is none of thy kindred that is called by this name.
1.tag: At sinabi nila sa kaniya, Wala sa iyong kamaganak na tinatawag sa pangalang ito.

1.eng: And they made signs to his father, how he would have him called.
1.tag: At hinudyatan nila ang kaniyang ama, kung ano ang ibig niyang itawag.

1.eng: And he asked for a writing table, and wrote, saying, His name is John. And they marvelled all.
1.tag: At humingi siya ng isang sulatan at sumulat, na sinasabi, Ang kaniyang pangalan ay Juan. At nagsipanggilalas silang lahat.

1.eng: And his mouth was opened immediately, and his tongue loosed , and he spake, and praised God.
1.tag: At pagdaka'y nabuka ang kaniyang bibig, at ang kaniyang dila'y nakalag, at siya'y nagsalita, na pinupuri ang Dios.

1.eng: And fear came on all that dwelt round about them: and all these sayings were noised abroad throughout all the hill country of Judaea.
1.tag: At sinidlan ng takot ang lahat ng nagsisipanahan sa palibot nila; at nabansag ang lahat ng mga bagay na ito sa lahat ng lupaing maburol ng Judea.

1.eng: And all they that heard them laid them up in their hearts, saying, What manner of child shall this be! And the hand of the Lord was with him.
1.tag: At lahat ng mga nangakarinig nito ay pawang iningatan sa kanilang puso, na sinasabi, Magiging ano nga kaya ang batang ito? Sapagka't ang kamay ng Panginoon ay sumasa kaniya.

1.eng: And his father Zacharias was filled with the Holy Ghost, and prophesied, saying,
1.tag: At si Zacarias na kaniyang ama ay napuspos ng Espiritu Santo, at nanghula, na nagsasabi.

1.eng: Blessed be the Lord God of Israel; for he hath visited and redeemed his people,
1.tag: Purihin ang Panginoon, ang Dios ng Israel; Sapagka't kaniyang dinalaw at tinubos ang kaniyang bayan.

1.eng: And hath raised up an horn of salvation for us in the house of his servant David;
1.tag: At nagtaas sa atin ng isang sungay ng kaligtasan Sa bahay ni David na kaniyang alipi.

1.eng: As he spake by the mouth of his holy prophets, which have been since the world began:
1.tag: (Gaya ng sinabi niya sa pamamagitan ng kaniyang mga banal na propeta na nagsilitaw buhat nang unang panahon).

1.eng: That we should be saved from our enemies, and from the hand of all that hate us;
1.tag: Kaligtasang mula sa ating mga kaaway, at sa kamay ng lahat ng nangapopoot sa atin.

1.eng: To perform the mercy promised to our fathers, and to remember his holy covenant;
1.tag: Upang magkaawang-gawa sa ating mga magulang, At alalahanin ang kaniyang banal na tipan.

1.eng: The oath which he sware to our father Abraham,
1.tag: Ang sumpa na isinumpa niya kay Abraham na ating ama.

1.eng: That he would grant unto us, that we being delivered out of the hand of our enemies might serve him without fear,
1.tag: Na ipagkaloob sa atin na yamang nangaligtas sa kamay ng ating mga kaaway, Ay paglingkuran natin siya ng walang takot.

1.eng: In holiness and righteousness before him, all the days of our life.
1.tag: Sa kabanalan at katuwiran sa harapan niya, lahat ng ating mga araw.

1.eng: And thou, child, shalt be called the prophet of the Highest: for thou shalt go before the face of the Lord to prepare his ways;
1.tag: Oo at ikaw, sanggol, tatawagin kang propeta ng kataastaasan; Sapagka't magpapauna ka sa unahan ng mukha ng Panginoon, upang ihanda ang kaniyang mga daan.

1.eng: To give knowledge of salvation unto his people by the remission of their sins,
1.tag: Upang maipakilala ang kaligtasan sa kaniyang bayan, Sa pagkapatawad ng kanilang mga kasalanan.

1.eng: Through the tender mercy of our God; whereby the dayspring from on high hath visited us,
1.tag: Dahil sa magiliw na habag ng aming Dios, Ang pagbubukang liwayway buhat sa kaitaasan ay dadalaw sa atin.

1.eng: To give light to them that sit in darkness and in the shadow of death, to guide our feet into the way of peace.
1.tag: Upang liwanagan ang nangakalugmok sa kadiliman at sa lilim ng kamatayan; Upang itumpak ang ating mga paa sa daan ng kapayapaan.

1.eng: And the child grew, and waxed strong in spirit, and was in the deserts till the day of his shewing unto Israel.
1.tag: At lumaki ang sanggol, at lumakas sa espiritu, at nasa mga ilang hanggang sa araw ng kaniyang pagpapakita sa Israel.

2.eng: And it came to pass in those days, that there went out a decree from Caesar Augustus, that all the world should be taxed.
2.tag: Nangyari nga nang mga araw na yaon na lumabas ang isang utos mula kay Augusto Cesar, na magpatala ang buong sanglibutan.

2.eng: ( And this taxing was first made when Cyrenius was governor of Syria.)
2.tag: Ito ang unang talaang-mamamayan na ginawa nang si Quirinio ay gobernador sa Siria.

2.eng: And all went to be taxed, every one into his own city.
2.tag: At nagsisiparoon ang lahat upang sila'y mangatala, bawa't isa sa kaniyang sariling bayan.

2.eng: And Joseph also went up from Galilee, out of the city of Nazareth, into Judaea, unto the city of David, which is called Bethlehem; (because he was of the house and lineage of David:)
2.tag: At si Jose naman ay umahon mula sa Galilea, mula sa bayan ng Nazaret, hanggang sa Judea, sa bayan ni David, na kung tawagi'y Bet-lehem, sapagka't siya'y sa angkan at sa lahi ni David.

2.eng: To be taxed with Mary his espoused wife, being great with child.
2.tag: Upang patala siya pati ni Maria, na magaasawa sa kaniya, na kasalukuyang kagampan.

2.eng: And so it was, that, while they were there, the days were accomplished that she should be delivered.
2.tag: At nangyari, samantalang sila'y nangaroroon, at naganap ang mga kaarawang dapat siyang manganak.

2.eng: And she brought forth her firstborn son, and wrapped him in swaddling clothes, and laid him in a manger; because there was no room for them in the inn.
2.tag: At kaniyang ipinanganak ang panganay niyang anak na lalake; at ito'y binalot niya ng mga lampin, at inihiga sa isang pasabsaban, sapagka't wala nang lugar para sa kanila sa tuluyan.

2.eng: And there were in the same country shepherds abiding in the field, keeping watch over their flock by night.
2.tag: At may mga pastor ng tupa sa lupain ding yaon na nangasa parang, na pinagpupuyatan sa gabi ang kanilang kawan.

2.eng: And, lo, the angel of the Lord came upon them, and the glory of the Lord shone round about them: and they were sore afraid.
2.tag: At tumayo sa tabi nila ang isang anghel ng Panginoon, at ang kaluwalhatian ng Panginoon ay nagliwanag sa palibot nila: at sila'y totoong nangatakot.

2.eng: And the angel said unto them, Fear not: for, behold, I bring you good tidings of great joy, which shall be to all people.
2.tag: At sinabi sa kanila ng anghel, Huwag kayong mangatakot; sapagka't narito, dinadalhan ko kayo ng mabubuting balita ng malaking kagalakan, na siyang sasa buong bayan.

2.eng: For unto you is born this day in the city of David a Saviour, which is Christ the Lord.
2.tag: Sapagka't ipinanganak sa inyo ngayon sa bayan ni David ang isang Tagapagligtas, na siya ang Cristo ang Panginoon.

2.eng: And this shall be a sign unto you; Ye shall find the babe wrapped in swaddling clothes, lying in a manger.
2.tag: At ito ang sa inyo'y magiging pinakatanda: Masusumpungan ninyo ang isang sanggol na nababalot ng lampin, at nakahiga sa isang pasabsaban.

2.eng: And suddenly there was with the angel a multitude of the heavenly host praising God, and saying,
2.tag: At biglang nakisama sa anghel ang isang karamihang hukbo ng langit, na nangagpupuri sa Dios, at nangagsasabi.

2.eng: Glory to God in the highest, and on earth peace, good will toward men.
2.tag: Luwalhati sa Dios sa kataastaasan, At sa lupa'y kapayapaan sa mga taong kinalulugdan niya.

2.eng: And it came to pass, as the angels were gone away from them into heaven, the shepherds said one to another, Let us now go even unto Bethlehem, and see this thing which is come to pass, which the Lord hath made known unto us.
2.tag: At nangyari nang lisanin sila ng mga anghel at nangapasa langit, ang mga pastor ay nangagsangusapan. Magsiparoon nga tayo ngayon hanggang sa Bet-lehem, at tingnan natin itong nangyari, na ipinagbigay alam sa atin ng Panginoon.

2.eng: And they came with haste, and found Mary, and Joseph, and the babe lying in a manger.
2.tag: At sila'y dalidaling nagsiparoon at nasumpungan kapuwa si Maria at si Jose, at ang sanggol na nakahiga sa pasabsaban.

2.eng: And when they had seen it , they made known abroad the saying which was told them concerning this child.
2.tag: At nang makita nila yaon, ay inihayag nila ang mga sinabi sa kanila tungkol sa sanggol na ito.

2.eng: And all they that heard it wondered at those things which were told them by the shepherds.
2.tag: At lahat ng nangakarinig nito ay nangagtaka sa mga bagay na sinabi sa kanila ng mga pastor.

2.eng: But Mary kept all these things, and pondered them in her heart.
2.tag: Datapuwa't iningatan ni Maria ang lahat ng mga pananalitang ito, na pinagbulaybulay sa kaniyang puso.

2.eng: And the shepherds returned, glorifying and praising God for all the things that they had heard and seen, as it was told unto them.
2.tag: At nangagbalik ang mga pastor, na niluluwalhati at pinupuri ang Dios dahil sa lahat ng mga bagay na kanilang nangarinig at nangakita, ayon sa sinabi sa kanila.

2.eng: And when eight days were accomplished for the circumcising of the child, his name was called JESUS, which was so named of the angel before he was conceived in the womb.
2.tag: At nang makaraan ang walong araw upang tuliin siya, ay tinawag na JESUS ang kaniyang pangalan, na siyang itinawag ng anghel bago siya ipinaglihi sa tiyan.

2.eng: And when the days of her purification according to the law of Moses were accomplished, they brought him to Jerusalem, to present him to the Lord;
2.tag: At nang maganap na ang mga araw na kanilang paglilinis alinsunod sa kautusan ni Moises, ay kanilang dinala siya sa Jerusalem, upang iharap siya sa Panginoo.

2.eng: (As it is written in the law of the Lord, Every male that openeth the womb shall be called holy to the Lord;)
2.tag: (Ayon sa nasusulat sa kautusan ng Panginoon, Ang bawa't lalaking nagbubukas ng bahay-bata ay tatawaging banal sa Panginoon).

2.eng: And to offer a sacrifice according to that which is said in the law of the Lord, A pair of turtledoves, or two young pigeons.
2.tag: At upang maghandog ng hain alinsunod sa sinasabi sa kautusan ng Panginoon, Dalawang batobato, o dalawang inakay ng kalapati.

2.eng: And, behold, there was a man in Jerusalem, whose name was Simeon; and the same man was just and devout, waiting for the consolation of Israel: and the Holy Ghost was upon him.
2.tag: At narito, may isang lalake sa Jerusalem, na nagngangalang Simeon; at ang lalaking ito'y matuwid at masipag sa kabanalan, na nag-aantay ng kaaliwan ng Israel: at sumasa kaniya ang Espiritu Santo.

2.eng: And it was revealed unto him by the Holy Ghost, that he should not see death, before he had seen the Lord's Christ.
2.tag: At ipinahayag sa kaniya ng Espiritu Santo, na di niya makikita ang kamatayan, hanggang sa makita muna niya ang Cristo ng Panginoon.

2.eng: And he came by the Spirit into the temple: and when the parents brought in the child Jesus, to do for him after the custom of the law,
2.tag: At siya'y napasa templo sa Espiritu: at nang ipasok sa templo ang sanggol na si Jesus ng kaniyang mga magulang, upang sa kaniya'y magawa nila ang nauukol alinsunod sa kaugalian ng kautusan.

2.eng: Then took he him up in his arms, and blessed God, and said,
2.tag: Ay tinanggap nga niya siya sa kaniyang mga bisig, at pinuri ang Dios, at nagsabi.

2.eng: Lord, now lettest thou thy servant depart in peace, according to thy word:
2.tag: Ngayo'y papanawin mo, Panginoon, ang iyong alipin, Ayon sa iyong salita, sa kapayapaan.

2.eng: For mine eyes have seen thy salvation,
2.tag: Sapagka't nakita ng aking mga mata ang iyong pagliligtas.

2.eng: Which thou hast prepared before the face of all people;
2.tag: Na iyong inihanda sa unahan ng mukha ng lahat ng mga tao.

2.eng: A light to lighten the Gentiles, and the glory of thy people Israel.
2.tag: Isang ilaw upang ipahayag sa mga Gentil, At ang kaluwalhatian ng iyong bayang Israel.

2.eng: And Joseph and his mother marvelled at those things which were spoken of him.
2.tag: At ang kaniyang ama at ang kaniyang ina ay nagsisipanggilalas sa mga bagay na sinasabi tungkol sa kaniya.

2.eng: And Simeon blessed them, and said unto Mary his mother, Behold, this child is set for the fall and rising again of many in Israel; and for a sign which shall be spoken against;
2.tag: At sila'y pinagpala ni Simeon, at sinabi sa kaniyang inang si Maria, Narito, ito ay itinalaga sa ikararapa at sa ikatitindig ng marami sa Israel; at pinakatandang tudlaan ng pagsalangsang.

2.eng: (Yea, a sword shall pierce through thy own soul also,) that the thoughts of many hearts may be revealed.
2.tag: Oo at paglalampasanan ng isang tabak ang iyong sariling kaluluwa; upang mangahayag ang mga pagiisip ng maraming puso.

2.eng: And there was one Anna, a prophetess, the daughter of Phanuel, of the tribe of Aser: she was of a great age, and had lived with an husband seven years from her virginity;
2.tag: At naroroon din naman si Ana, na isang propetisa, anak na babae ni Fanuel, sa angkan ni Aser, (siya'y lubhang matanda na, at may pitong taong nakisama sa kaniyang asawa mula sa kaniyang kadalagahan.

2.eng: And she was a widow of about fourscore and four years, which departed not from the temple, but served God with fastings and prayers night and day.
2.tag: At siya'y bao nang walongpu't apat na taon), na hindi humihiwalay sa templo, at sumasamba sa gabi at araw sa pamamagitan ng mga pagaayuno at mga pagdaing.

2.eng: And she coming in that instant gave thanks likewise unto the Lord, and spake of him to all them that looked for redemption in Jerusalem.
2.tag: At pagdating niya sa oras ding yaon, siya'y nagpasalamat sa Dios, at nagsalita ng tungkol sa sanggol sa lahat ng nagsisipaghintay ng katubusan sa Jerusalem.

2.eng: And when they had performed all things according to the law of the Lord, they returned into Galilee, to their own city Nazareth.
2.tag: At nang maganap na nila ang lahat ng mga bagay na alinsunod sa kautusan ng Panginoon, ay nangagbalik sila sa Galilea, sa kanilang sariling bayang Nazaret.

2.eng: And the child grew, and waxed strong in spirit, filled with wisdom: and the grace of God was upon him.
2.tag: At lumalaki ang bata, at lumalakas, at napupuspos ng karunungan: at sumasa kaniya ang biyaya ng Dios.

2.eng: Now his parents went to Jerusalem every year at the feast of the passover.
2.tag: At nagsisiparoon taon-taon ang kaniyang mga magulang sa Jerusalem sa kapistahan ng paskua.

2.eng: And when he was twelve years old, they went up to Jerusalem after the custom of the feast.
2.tag: At nang siya'y may labindalawang taon na, ay nagsiahon sila ayon sa kaugalian ng kapistahan.

2.eng: And when they had fulfilled the days, as they returned, the child Jesus tarried behind in Jerusalem; and Joseph and his mother knew not of it .
2.tag: At nang kanilang maganap na ang mga araw, sa pagbalik nila, ay naiwan ang batang si Jesus sa Jerusalem; at di nalalaman ng kaniyang mga magulang.

2.eng: But they, supposing him to have been in the company, went a day's journey; and they sought him among their kinsfolk and acquaintance.
2.tag: Nguni't sa pagaakala nilang siya'y nasa kasamahan, ay nagsiyaon sila nang isang araw na paglalakbay; at hinahanap nila siya sa mga kamaganak at mga kakilala.

2.eng: And when they found him not, they turned back again to Jerusalem, seeking him.
2.tag: At nang di nila siya matagpuan, ay nagsipagbalik sila sa Jerusalem, na hinahanap siya.

2.eng: And it came to pass, that after three days they found him in the temple, sitting in the midst of the doctors, both hearing them, and asking them questions.
2.tag: At nangyari, na nang makaraan ang tatlong araw, ay nangatagpuan nila siya sa templo, na nakaupo sa gitna ng mga guro, na sila'y pinakikinggan, at sila'y tinatanong.

2.eng: And all that heard him were astonished at his understanding and answers.
2.tag: At ang lahat ng sa kaniya'y nangakakarinig ay nagsisipanggilalas sa kaniyang katalinuhan at sa kaniyang mga sagot.

2.eng: And when they saw him, they were amazed: and his mother said unto him, Son, why hast thou thus dealt with us? behold, thy father and I have sought thee sorrowing.
2.tag: At nang siya'y mangakita nila, ay nangagtaka sila; at sinabi sa kaniya ng kaniyang ina, Anak, bakit ginawa mo sa amin ang ganyan? narito, ang iyong ama at ako na hinahanap kang may hapis.

2.eng: And he said unto them, How is it that ye sought me? wist ye not that I must be about my Father's business?
2.tag: At sinabi niya sa kanila, Bakit ninyo ako hinahanap? di baga talastas ninyo na dapat akong maglumagak sa bahay ng aking Ama.

2.eng: And they understood not the saying which he spake unto them.
2.tag: At di nila naunawa ang pananalitang sa kanila'y sinabi.

2.eng: And he went down with them, and came to Nazareth, and was subject unto them: but his mother kept all these sayings in her heart.
2.tag: At lumusong siyang kasama nila, at napasa Nazaret; at napasakop sa kanila: at iniingatan ng kaniyang ina sa kaniyang puso ang lahat ng mga pananalitang ito.

2.eng: And Jesus increased in wisdom and stature, and in favour with God and man.
2.tag: At lumalaki si Jesus sa karunungan at sa pangangatawan, at sa pagbibigay lugod sa Dios at sa mga tao.

3.eng: Now in the fifteenth year of the reign of Tiberius Caesar, Pontius Pilate being governor of Judaea, and Herod being tetrarch of Galilee, and his brother Philip tetrarch of Ituraea and of the region of Trachonitis, and Lysanias the tetrarch of Abilene,
3.tag: Nang ikalabinglimang taon nga ng paghahari ni Tiberio Cesar, na noo'y gobernador sa Judea si Poncio Pilato, at tetrarka sa Galilea si Herodes, at ang kaniyang kapatid na si Felipe ay tetrarka sa lalawigan ng Iturea at Traconite, at si Lisanias ay tetrarka sa Abilinia.

3.eng: Annas and Caiaphas being the high priests, the word of God came unto John the son of Zacharias in the wilderness.
3.tag: Nang kasalukuyang mga pangulong saserdote si Anas at si Caifas, ay dumating ang salita ng Dios kay Juan, anak ni Zacarias, sa ilang.

3.eng: And he came into all the country about Jordan, preaching the baptism of repentance for the remission of sins;
3.tag: At siya'y napasa buong lupain sa palibotlibot ng Jordan, na ipinangangaral ang bautismo ng pagsisisi sa ikapagpapatawad ng mga kasalanan.

3.eng: As it is written in the book of the words of Esaias the prophet, saying, The voice of one crying in the wilderness, Prepare ye the way of the Lord, make his paths straight.
3.tag: Gaya ng nasusulat sa aklat ng salita ng propeta Isaias, Ang tinig ng isang sumisigaw sa ilang, Ihanda ninyo ang daan ng Panginoon, Tuwirin ninyo ang kaniyang mga landas.

3.eng: Every valley shall be filled, and every mountain and hill shall be brought low; and the crooked shall be made straight, and the rough ways shall be made smooth;
3.tag: Lahat ng libis ay tatambakan, At pababain ang bawa't bundok at burol; At ang liko ay matutuwid, At ang mga daang bakobako ay mangapapatag.

3.eng: And all flesh shall see the salvation of God.
3.tag: At makikita ng lahat ng laman ang pagliligtas ng Dios.

3.eng: Then said he to the multitude that came forth to be baptized of him, O generation of vipers, who hath warned you to flee from the wrath to come?
3.tag: Sinasabi nga niya sa mga karamihang nagsisilabas upang mangagpabautismo sa kaniya, Kayong lahi ng mga ulupong, sino ang sa inyo'y nagudyok upang tumakas sa galit na darating.

3.eng: Bring forth therefore fruits worthy of repentance, and begin not to say within yourselves, We have Abraham to our father: for I say unto you, That God is able of these stones to raise up children unto Abraham.
3.tag: Kayo nga'y mangagbunga ng karapatdapat sa pagsisisi, at huwag mangagpasimulang mangagsabi sa inyong sarili, Si Abraham ang siya naming ama; sapagka't sinasabi ko sa inyo, na makapagpapabangon ang Dios ng mga anak ni Abraham maging sa mga batong ito.

3.eng: And now also the axe is laid unto the root of the trees: every tree therefore which bringeth not forth good fruit is hewn down, and cast into the fire.
3.tag: At ngayon pa'y nakalagay na ang palakol sa ugat ng mga punong kahoy: ang bawa't punong kahoy nga na di nagbubunga ng mabuti ay pinuputol, at inihahagis sa apoy.

3.eng: And the people asked him, saying, What shall we do then?
3.tag: At tinanong siya ng karamihan, na nangagsasabi, Ano ngang dapat namin gawin.

3.eng: He answereth and saith unto them, He that hath two coats, let him impart to him that hath none; and he that hath meat, let him do likewise.
3.tag: At sinagot niya at sinabi sa kanila, Ang may dalawang tunika ay magbahagi sa wala; at ang may pagkain ay gayon din ang gawin.

3.eng: Then came also publicans to be baptized, and said unto him, Master, what shall we do?
3.tag: At dumating naman ang mga maniningil ng buwis upang mangagpabautismo, at sinabi nila sa kaniya, Guro, anong dapat naming gawin.

3.eng: And he said unto them, Exact no more than that which is appointed you.
3.tag: At sinabi niya sa kanila, Huwag na kayong sumingil pa ng higit kay sa utos sa inyo.

3.eng: And the soldiers likewise demanded of him, saying, And what shall we do? And he said unto them, Do violence to no man, neither accuse any falsely; and be content with your wages.
3.tag: At tinanong naman siya ng mga kawal, na nangagsasabi, At kami, anong dapat naming gawin? At sa kanila'y sinabi niya, Huwag kayong kumuhang may karahasan sa kanino man, ni mangagparatang; at mangagkasiya kayo sa bayad sa inyo.

3.eng: And as the people were in expectation, and all men mused in their hearts of John, whether he were the Christ, or not;
3.tag: At samantalang ang mga tao'y nagsisipaghintay at pinagbubulaybulay ng lahat sa kanilang puso ang tungkol kay Juan, kung siya kaya ang Cristo.

3.eng: John answered, saying unto them all, I indeed baptize you with water; but one mightier than I cometh, the latchet of whose shoes I am not worthy to unloose: he shall baptize you with the Holy Ghost and with fire:
3.tag: Ay sumagot si Juan na sinasabi sa kanilang lahat, Katotohanang binabautismuhan ko kayo ng tubig; datapuwa't dumarating ang lalong makapangyarihan kay sa akin; ako'y hindi karapatdapat magkalag ng panali ng kaniyang mga pangyapak: kayo'y babautismuhan niya sa Espiritu Santo at sa apoy.

3.eng: Whose fan is in his hand, and he will throughly purge his floor, and will gather the wheat into his garner; but the chaff he will burn with fire unquenchable.
3.tag: Nasa kaniyang kamay ang kaniyang kalaykay, upang linising lubos ang kaniyang giikan, at tipunin ang trigo sa kaniyang bangan; datapuwa't susunugin niya ang dayami sa apoy na hindi mapapatay.

3.eng: And many other things in his exhortation preached he unto the people.
3.tag: Sa mga iba pang maraming pangaral ay ipinangangaral nga niya sa bayan ang mabuting balita.

3.eng: But Herod the tetrarch, being reproved by him for Herodias his brother Philip's wife, and for all the evils which Herod had done,
3.tag: Datapuwa't si Herodes na tetrarka, palibhasa'y pinagwikaan niya dahil kay Herodias, na asawa ng kaniyang kapatid, at dahil sa lahat ng masasamang bagay na ginawa ni Herodes.

3.eng: Added yet this above all, that he shut up John in prison.
3.tag: Ay naparagdag naman ito sa lahat, na kinulong niya si Juan sa bilangguan.

3.eng: Now when all the people were baptized, it came to pass, that Jesus also being baptized, and praying, the heaven was opened,
3.tag: Nangyari nga, nang mabautismuhan ang buong bayan, na si Jesus ay binautismuhan naman, at nang nananalangin, ay nabuksan ang langit.

3.eng: And the Holy Ghost descended in a bodily shape like a dove upon him, and a voice came from heaven, which said, Thou art my beloved Son; in thee I am well pleased.
3.tag: At bumaba sa kaniya ang Espiritu Santo na may anyong katawan, tulad sa isang kalapati, at nanggaling ang isang tinig sa langit, Ikaw ang sinisinta kong Anak; sa iyo ako lubos na nalulugod.

3.eng: And Jesus himself began to be about thirty years of age, being (as was supposed) the son of Joseph, which was the son of Heli,
3.tag: At si Jesus din, nang magpasimula siyang magturo ay may gulang na tatlongpung taon, na anak (ayon sa sinasapantaha) ni Jose, ni Eli.

3.eng: Which was the son of Matthat, which was the son of Levi, which was the son of Melchi, which was the son of Janna, which was the son of Joseph,
3.tag: Ni Matat, ni Levi, ni Melqui, ni Jane, ni Jose.

3.eng: Which was the son of Mattathias, which was the son of Amos, which was the son of Naum, which was the son of Esli, which was the son of Nagge,
3.tag: Ni Matatias, ni Amos, ni Nahum, ni Esli, ni Nage.

3.eng: Which was the son of Maath, which was the son of Mattathias, which was the son of Semei, which was the son of Joseph, which was the son of Juda,
3.tag: Ni Maat, ni Matatias, ni Semei, ni Jose, ni Juda.

3.eng: Which was the son of Joanna, which was the son of Rhesa, which was the son of Zorobabel, which was the son of Salathiel, which was the son of Neri,
3.tag: Ni Joana, ni Resa, ni Zorobabel, ni Seatiel, ni Neri.

3.eng: Which was the son of Melchi, which was the son of Addi, which was the son of Cosam, which was the son of Elmodam, which was the son of Er,
3.tag: Ni Melqui, ni Adi, ni Cosam, ni Elmodam, ni Er.

3.eng: Which was the son of Jose, which was the son of Eliezer, which was the son of Jorim, which was the son of Matthat, which was the son of Levi,
3.tag: Ni Jesus, ni Eliezer, ni Jorim, ni Mata, ni Levi.

3.eng: Which was the son of Simeon, which was the son of Juda, which was the son of Joseph, which was the son of Jonan, which was the son of Eliakim,
3.tag: Ni Simeon, ni Juda, ni Jose, ni Jonan, ni Eliaquim.

3.eng: Which was the son of Melea, which was the son of Menan, which was the son of Mattatha, which was the son of Nathan, which was the son of David,
3.tag: Ni Melea, ni Mena, ni Matata, ni Natan, ni David.

3.eng: Which was the son of Jesse, which was the son of Obed, which was the son of Booz, which was the son of Salmon, which was the son of Naasson,
3.tag: Ni Jesse, ni Obed, ni Booz, ni Salmon, ni Naason.

3.eng: Which was the son of Aminadab, which was the son of Aram, which was the son of Esrom, which was the son of Phares, which was the son of Juda,
3.tag: Ni Aminadab, ni Aram, ni Esrom, ni Fares, ni Juda.

3.eng: Which was the son of Jacob, which was the son of Isaac, which was the son of Abraham, which was the son of Thara, which was the son of Nachor,
3.tag: Ni Jacob, ni Isaac, ni Abraham, ni Tare, ni Nacor.

3.eng: Which was the son of Saruch, which was the son of Ragau, which was the son of Phalec, which was the son of Heber, which was the son of Sala,
3.tag: Ni Serug, ni Regan, ni Paleg, ni Heber, ni Selah.

3.eng: Which was the son of Cainan, which was the son of Arphaxad, which was the son of Sem, which was the son of Noe, which was the son of Lamech,
3.tag: Ni Cainan, ni Arfaxjad, ni Sem, ni Noe, ni Lamec.

3.eng: Which was the son of Mathusala, which was the son of Enoch, which was the son of Jared, which was the son of Maleleel, which was the son of Cainan,
3.tag: Ni Matusalem, ni Enoc, ni Jared, ni Mahalaleel, ni Cainan.

3.eng: Which was the son of Enos, which was the son of Seth, which was the son of Adam, which was the son of God.
3.tag: Ni Enos, ni Set, ni Adam, ng Dios.

4.eng: And Jesus being full of the Holy Ghost returned from Jordan, and was led by the Spirit into the wilderness,
4.tag: At si Jesus, na puspos ng Espiritu Santo ay bumalik mula sa Jordan at inihatid ng Espiritu sa ilang.

4.eng: Being forty days tempted of the devil. And in those days he did eat nothing: and when they were ended, he afterward hungered.
4.tag: Sa loob ng apat na pung araw na tinutukso ng diablo. At hindi siya kumain ng anoman nang mga araw na yaon; at nang maganap ang mga yaon ay nagutom siya.

4.eng: And the devil said unto him, If thou be the Son of God, command this stone that it be made bread.
4.tag: At sinabi sa kaniya ng diablo, Kung ikaw ang Anak ng Dios, ipag-utos mo na ang batong ito ay maging tinapay.

4.eng: And Jesus answered him, saying, It is written, That man shall not live by bread alone, but by every word of God.
4.tag: At sinagot siya ni Jesus, Nasusulat, Hindi sa tinapay lamang mabubuhay ang tao.

4.eng: And the devil, taking him up into an high mountain, shewed unto him all the kingdoms of the world in a moment of time.
4.tag: At iniakyat pa siya niya, at ipinakita sa kaniya sa sandaling panahon ang lahat ng mga kaharian sa sanglibutan.

4.eng: And the devil said unto him, All this power will I give thee, and the glory of them: for that is delivered unto me; and to whomsoever I will I give it.
4.tag: At sinabi sa kaniya ng diablo, Sa iyo'y ibibigay ko ang lahat ng kapamahalaang ito, at ang kaluwalhatian nila: sapagka't ito'y naibigay na sa akin; at ibibigay ko kung kanino ko ibig.

4.eng: If thou therefore wilt worship me, all shall be thine.
4.tag: Kaya nga kung sasamba ka sa harapan ko, ay magiging iyong lahat.

4.eng: And Jesus answered and said unto him, Get thee behind me, Satan: for it is written, Thou shalt worship the Lord thy God, and him only shalt thou serve.
4.tag: At si Jesus ay sumagot at sinabi sa kaniya, Nasusulat, Sa Panginoon mong Dios sasamba ka, at siya lamang ang iyong paglilingkuran.

4.eng: And he brought him to Jerusalem, and set him on a pinnacle of the temple, and said unto him, If thou be the Son of God, cast thyself down from hence:
4.tag: At dinala niya siya sa Jerusalem, at inilagay siya sa taluktok ng templo, at sinabi sa kaniya, Kung ikaw ay Anak ng Dios, ay magpatihulog ka mula rito hanggang sa ibaba.

4.eng: For it is written, He shall give his angels charge over thee, to keep thee:
4.tag: Sapagka't nasusulat, Siya'y magbibilin sa kaniyang mga anghel tungkol sa iyo, upang ikaw ay ingatan.

4.eng: And in their hands they shall bear thee up, lest at any time thou dash thy foot against a stone.
4.tag: At, Aalalayan ka nila ng kanilang mga kamay, Baka matisod ka ng iyong paa sa isang bato.

4.eng: And Jesus answering said unto him, It is said, Thou shalt not tempt the Lord thy God.
4.tag: At pagsagot ni Jesus ay sinabi sa kaniya, Nasasabi, Huwag mong tutuksuhin ang Panginoon mong Dios.

4.eng: And when the devil had ended all the temptation, he departed from him for a season.
4.tag: At nang matapos ng diablo ang lahat ng pagtukso, ay hiniwalayan siya niya ng ilang panahon.

4.eng: And Jesus returned in the power of the Spirit into Galilee: and there went out a fame of him through all the region round about.
4.tag: At bumalik si Jesus sa Galilea sa kapangyarihan ng Espiritu: at kumalat ang kabantugan tungkol sa kaniya sa palibot ng buong lupain.

4.eng: And he taught in their synagogues, being glorified of all.
4.tag: At nagtuturo siya sa mga sinagoga nila, na niluluwalhati ng lahat.

4.eng: And he came to Nazareth, where he had been brought up: and, as his custom was, he went into the synagogue on the sabbath day, and stood up for to read.
4.tag: At siya'y napasa Nazaret na kaniyang nilakhan: at ayon sa kaniyang kaugalian, siya'y pumasok sa sinagoga nang araw ng sabbath, at nagtindig upang bumasa.

4.eng: And there was delivered unto him the book of the prophet Esaias. And when he had opened the book, he found the place where it was written,
4.tag: At ibinigay sa kaniya ang aklat ng propeta Isaias. At binuklat niya ang aklat, na nasumpungan niya ang dakong kinasusulatan.

4.eng: The Spirit of the Lord is upon me, because he hath anointed me to preach the gospel to the poor; he hath sent me to heal the brokenhearted, to preach deliverance to the captives, and recovering of sight to the blind, to set at liberty them that are bruised,
4.tag: Sumasa akin ang Espiritu ng Panginoon, Sapagka't ako'y pinahiran niya upang ipangaral ang mabubuting balita sa mga dukha: Ako'y sinugo niya upang itanyag sa mga bihag ang pagkaligtas, At sa mga bulag ang pagkakita, Upang bigyan ng kalayaan ang nangaaapi.

4.eng: To preach the acceptable year of the Lord.
4.tag: Upang itanyag ang kaayaayang taon ng Panginoon.

4.eng: And he closed the book, and he gave it again to the minister, and sat down. And the eyes of all them that were in the synagogue were fastened on him.
4.tag: At binalumbon niya ang aklat, at isinauli sa naglilingkod, at naupo: at ang mga mata ng lahat ng nangasa sinagoga ay nangakatitig sa kaniya.

4.eng: And he began to say unto them, This day is this scripture fulfilled in your ears.
4.tag: At siya'y nagpasimulang magsabi sa kanila, Ngayo'y naganap ang kasulatang ito sa inyong mga pakinig.

4.eng: And all bare him witness, and wondered at the gracious words which proceeded out of his mouth. And they said, Is not this Joseph's son?
4.tag: At siya'y pinatotohanan ng lahat, at nangagtataka sa mga salita ng biyaya na lumalabas sa kaniyang bibig: at sinabi nila, Hindi baga ito ang anak ni Jose.

4.eng: And he said unto them, Ye will surely say unto me this proverb, Physician, heal thyself: whatsoever we have heard done in Capernaum, do also here in thy country.
4.tag: At sinabi niya sa kanila, Walang salang sasabihin ninyo sa akin itong talinghaga, Manggagamot, gamutin mo ang iyong sarili: ang anomang aming narinig na ginawa sa Capernaum, ay gawin mo naman dito sa iyong lupain.

4.eng: And he said, Verily I say unto you, No prophet is accepted in his own country.
4.tag: At sinabi niya, Katotohanang sinasabi ko sa inyo, Walang propetang kinalulugdan sa kaniyang tinubuang lupa.

4.eng: But I tell you of a truth, many widows were in Israel in the days of Elias, when the heaven was shut up three years and six months, when great famine was throughout all the land;
4.tag: Datapuwa't katotohanang sinasabi ko sa inyo, Maraming mga baong babai sa Israel nang mga araw ni Elias, nang sarhan ang langit sa loob ng tatlong taon at anim na buwan, noong datnan ng malaking kagutom ang buong sangkalupaan.

4.eng: But unto none of them was Elias sent, save unto Sarepta, a city of Sidon, unto a woman that was a widow.
4.tag: At sa kanino man sa kanila ay hindi sinugo si Elias, kundi sa Sarepta sa lupa ng Sidon, sa isang babaing bao.

4.eng: And many lepers were in Israel in the time of Eliseus the prophet; and none of them was cleansed, saving Naaman the Syrian.
4.tag: At maraming ketongin sa Israel nang panahon ni Eliseo na propeta; at sinoman sa kanila'y hindi nilinis, kundi lamang si Naaman na Siro.

4.eng: And all they in the synagogue, when they heard these things, were filled with wrath,
4.tag: At nangapuspos ng galit ang lahat ng nangasa sinagoga, sa pagkarinig nila ng mga bagay na ito.

4.eng: And rose up, and thrust him out of the city, and led him unto the brow of the hill whereon their city was built, that they might cast him down headlong.
4.tag: At sila'y nagsitindig, at ipinagtabuyan siya sa labas ng bayan at dinala siya hanggang sa ibabaw ng taluktok ng gulod na kinatatayuan ng kanilang bayan, upang siya'y maibulid nila ng patiwarik.

4.eng: But he passing through the midst of them went his way,
4.tag: Datapuwa't pagdaraan niya sa gitna nila, ay yumaon ng kaniyang lakad.

4.eng: And came down to Capernaum, a city of Galilee, and taught them on the sabbath days.
4.tag: At siya'y bumaba sa Capernaum, na isang bayan ng Galilea. At sila'y tinuruan niya sa araw ng sabbath.

4.eng: And they were astonished at his doctrine: for his word was with power.
4.tag: At nangagtaka sila sa kaniyang aral, sapagka't may kapamahalaan ang kaniyang salita.

4.eng: And in the synagogue there was a man, which had a spirit of an unclean devil, and cried out with a loud voice,
4.tag: At sa sinagoga ay may isang lalake na may espiritu ng karumaldumal na demonio; at siya'y sumigaw ng malakas na tinig.

4.eng: Saying, Let us alone; what have we to do with thee, thou Jesus of Nazareth? art thou come to destroy us? I know thee who thou art; the Holy One of God.
4.tag: Ah! anong mayroon kami sa iyo, Jesus, ikaw na Nazareno? naparito ka baga upang kami'y iyong puksain? nakikilala ko ikaw kung sino ka, ang Banal ng Dios.

4.eng: And Jesus rebuked him, saying, Hold thy peace, and come out of him. And when the devil had thrown him in the midst, he came out of him, and hurt him not.
4.tag: At sinaway siya ni Jesus, na sinasabi, Tumahimik ka, at lumabas ka sa kaniya. At nang siya'y mailugmok ng demonio sa gitna, ay lumabas siya sa kaniya, na hindi siya sinaktan.

4.eng: And they were all amazed, and spake among themselves, saying, What a word is this! for with authority and power he commandeth the unclean spirits, and they come out.
4.tag: At silang lahat ay nangagtaka at nagsalitaan ang isa't isa, na nangagsasabi, Anong salita kaya ito? sapagka't siya na may kapamahalaan at kapangyarihan ay naguutos sa mga karumaldumal na espiritu, at nagsisilabas sila.

4.eng: And the fame of him went out into every place of the country round about.
4.tag: At kumakalat ang alingawngaw tungkol sa kaniya sa lahat ng dako sa palibotlibot ng lupaing yaon.

4.eng: And he arose out of the synagogue, and entered into Simon's house. And Simon's wife's mother was taken with a great fever; and they besought him for her.
4.tag: At siya'y nagtindig sa sinagoga, at pumasok sa bahay ni Simon. At nilalagnat na mainam ang biyanang babae ni Simon, at siya'y kanilang ipinamanhik sa kaniya.

4.eng: And he stood over her, and rebuked the fever; and it left her: and immediately she arose and ministered unto them.
4.tag: At tinunghan niya siya, at sinaway ang lagnat; at inibsan siya: at siya'y nagtindig pagdaka at naglingkod sa kanila.

4.eng: Now when the sun was setting, all they that had any sick with divers diseases brought them unto him; and he laid his hands on every one of them, and healed them.
4.tag: At nang lumulubog na ang araw, ang lahat na may mga sakit ng sarisaring karamdaman ay dinala sa kaniya; at ipinatong niya ang kaniyang mga kamay sa bawa't isa sa kanila, at sila'y pinagaling.

4.eng: And devils also came out of many, crying out, and saying, Thou art Christ the Son of God. And he rebuking them suffered them not to speak: for they knew that he was Christ.
4.tag: At nagsilabas din sa marami ang mga demonio na nagsisisigaw, na nagsasabi, Ikaw ang anak ng Dios. At sinasaway sila, na di niya sila tinutulutang mangagsalita, sapagka't naalaman nilang siya ang Cristo.

4.eng: And when it was day, he departed and went into a desert place: and the people sought him, and came unto him, and stayed him, that he should not depart from them.
4.tag: At nang araw na, ay lumabas siya at naparoon sa isang ilang na dako: at hinahanap siya ng mga karamihan, at nagsiparoon sa kaniya, at pinagpipilitang pigilin siya, upang huwag siyang humiwalay sa kanila.

4.eng: And he said unto them, I must preach the kingdom of God to other cities also: for therefore am I sent.
4.tag: Datapuwa't sinabi niya sa kanila, Dapat namang ipangaral ko sa mga ibang bayan ang mabubuting balita ng kaharian ng Dios: sapagka't sa ganito ay sinugo ako.

4.eng: And he preached in the synagogues of Galilee.
4.tag: At siya'y nangangaral sa mga sinagoga ng Galilea.

5.eng: And it came to pass, that, as the people pressed upon him to hear the word of God, he stood by the lake of Gennesaret,
5.tag: Nangyari nga, na samantalang siya'y sinisiksik ng karamihan na pinakikinggan ang salita ng Dios, na siya'y nakatayo sa tabi ng dagatdagatan ng Genezaret.

5.eng: And saw two ships standing by the lake: but the fishermen were gone out of them, and were washing their nets.
5.tag: At nakakita siya ng dalawang daong na nasa tabi ng dagatdagatan: datapuwa't nagsilunsad sa mga yaon ang mga mamamalakaya, at hinuhugasan ang kanilang mga lambat.

5.eng: And he entered into one of the ships, which was Simon's, and prayed him that he would thrust out a little from the land. And he sat down, and taught the people out of the ship.
5.tag: At lumulan siya sa isa sa mga daong, na kay Simon, at ipinamanhik niya dito na ilayo ng kaunti sa lupa. At siya'y naupo at nagturo sa mga karamihan buhat sa daong.

5.eng: Now when he had left speaking, he said unto Simon, Launch out into the deep, and let down your nets for a draught.
5.tag: At pagtigil niya ng pagsasalita, ay sinabi niya kay Simon, Pumaroon ka sa laot, at ihulog ninyo ang inyong mga lambat upang mamalakaya.

5.eng: And Simon answering said unto him, Master, we have toiled all the night, and have taken nothing: nevertheless at thy word I will let down the net.
5.tag: At sumagot si Simon at sinabi, Guro, sa buong magdamag ay nagsipagpagal kami, at wala kaming nahuli: datapuwa't sa iyong salita ay ihuhulog ko ang mga lambat.

5.eng: And when they had this done, they inclosed a great multitude of fishes: and their net brake.
5.tag: At nang magawa nila ito, ay nakahuli sila ng lubhang maraming isda; at nagkampupunit ang kanilang mga lambat.

5.eng: And they beckoned unto their partners, which were in the other ship, that they should come and help them. And they came, and filled both the ships, so that they began to sink.
5.tag: At kinawayan nila ang mga kasamahan sa isang daong upang magsilapit at sila'y tulungan. At sila'y nagsilapit at nangapuno ang dalawang daong, ano pa't sila'y nagpasimulang lulubog.

5.eng: When Simon Peter saw it , he fell down at Jesus' knees, saying, Depart from me; for I am a sinful man, O Lord.
5.tag: Datapuwa't nang makita ni Simon Pedro, ay nagpatirapa sa mga tuhod ni Jesus, na nagsasabi, Lumayo ka sa akin; sapagka't ako'y taong makasalanan, Oh Panginoon.

5.eng: For he was astonished, and all that were with him, at the draught of the fishes which they had taken:
5.tag: Sapagka't siya at ang lahat ng kasama niya ay nagsipanggilalas, dahil sa karamihan ng mga isdang kanilang nangahuli.

5.eng: And so was also James, and John, the sons of Zebedee, which were partners with Simon. And Jesus said unto Simon, Fear not; from henceforth thou shalt catch men.
5.tag: At gayon din si Santiago at si Juan, mga anak ni Zebedeo, na mga kasama ni Simon. At sinabi ni Jesus kay Simon, Huwag kang matakot; mula ngayon ay mamamalakaya ka ng mga tao.

5.eng: And when they had brought their ships to land, they forsook all, and followed him.
5.tag: At nang maisadsad na nila sa lupa ang kanilang mga daong, ay iniwan nila ang lahat, at nagsisunod sa kaniya.

5.eng: And it came to pass, when he was in a certain city, behold a man full of leprosy: who seeing Jesus fell on his face, and besought him, saying, Lord, if thou wilt, thou canst make me clean.
5.tag: At nangyari, samantalang siya'y nasa isa sa mga bayan, narito, may isang lalake na lipos ng ketong: at nang makita niya si Jesus, ay nagpatirapa siya, at namanhik sa kaniya, na sinasabi, Panginoon, kung ibig mo, ay maaaring linisin mo ako.

5.eng: And he put forth his hand, and touched him, saying, I will: be thou clean. And immediately the leprosy departed from him.
5.tag: At iniunat niya ang kaniyang kamay at siya'y hinipo, na sinasabi, Ibig ko; luminis ka. At pagdaka'y nilisan siya ng ketong.

5.eng: And he charged him to tell no man: but go, and shew thyself to the priest, and offer for thy cleansing, according as Moses commanded, for a testimony unto them.
5.tag: At ipinagbilin niya sa kaniya na huwag sabihin kanino man: kundi yumaon ka ng iyong lakad, at pakita ka sa saserdote, at maghandog ka sa pagkalinis sa iyo, alinsunod sa iniutos ni Moises, na pinakapatotoo sa kanila.

5.eng: But so much the more went there a fame abroad of him: and great multitudes came together to hear, and to be healed by him of their infirmities.
5.tag: Datapuwa't lalo nang kumakalat ang balita tungkol sa kaniya: at nangagkatipon ang lubhang maraming tao upang makinig, at upang pagalingin sa kanilang mga sakit.

5.eng: And he withdrew himself into the wilderness, and prayed.
5.tag: Datapuwa't siya'y lumigpit sa mga ilang, at nananalangin.

5.eng: And it came to pass on a certain day, as he was teaching, that there were Pharisees and doctors of the law sitting by, which were come out of every town of Galilee, and Judaea, and Jerusalem: and the power of the Lord was present to heal them.
5.tag: At nangyari nang isa sa mga araw na yaon, na siya'y nagtuturo; at may nangakaupo doong mga Fariseo at mga guro sa kautusan, na nagsipanggaling sa bawa't nayon ng Galilea at Judea at Jerusalem: at ang kapangyarihan ng Panginoon ay sumasa kaniya upang magpagaling.

5.eng: And, behold, men brought in a bed a man which was taken with a palsy: and they sought means to bring him in, and to lay him before him.
5.tag: At narito, dinala ng mga tao na nasa isang higaan ang isang lalaking lumpo: at pinagpipilitan niyang maipasok siya, at ilagay siya sa harap nila.

5.eng: And when they could not find by what way they might bring him in because of the multitude, they went upon the housetop, and let him down through the tiling with his couch into the midst before Jesus.
5.tag: At sa hindi pagkasumpong ng mapagpapasukan, dahil sa karamihan, ay nagsiakyat sila sa bubungan ng bahay, at siya'y inihugos mula sa butas ng bubungan pati ng kaniyang higaan, sa gitna, sa harapan ni Jesus.

5.eng: And when he saw their faith, he said unto him, Man, thy sins are forgiven thee.
5.tag: At pagkakita sa kanilang pananampalataya, ay kaniyang sinabi, Lalake, ipinatatawad sa iyo ang iyong mga kasalanan.

5.eng: And the scribes and the Pharisees began to reason, saying, Who is this which speaketh blasphemies? Who can forgive sins, but God alone?
5.tag: At ang mga eskriba at mga Fariseo ay nangagpasimulang mangagkatuwiranan, na nangagsasabi, Sino ito na nagsasalita ng mga kapusungan? Sino ang makapagpapatawad ng mga kasalanan, kundi ang Dios lamang.

5.eng: But when Jesus perceived their thoughts, he answering said unto them, What reason ye in your hearts?
5.tag: Datapuwa't si Jesus, na nakatatanto ng kanilang mga iniisip, ay sumagot at sinabi sa kanila, Bakit pinagbubulaybulay ninyo sa inyong mga puso.

5.eng: Whether is easier, to say, Thy sins be forgiven thee; or to say, Rise up and walk?
5.tag: Alin baga ang lalong magaang sabihin, Ipinatatawad sa iyo ang iyong mga kasalanan; o sabihin, Magtindig ka at lumakad ka.

5.eng: But that ye may know that the Son of man hath power upon earth to forgive sins, (he said unto the sick of the palsy,) I say unto thee, Arise, and take up thy couch, and go into thine house.
5.tag: Datapuwa't upang maalaman ninyo na ang Anak ng tao ay may kapamahalaan sa lupa na magpatawad ng mga kasalanan (sinabi niya sa lumpo), Sa iyo ko sinasabi, Magtindig ka, at buhatin mo ang iyong higaan, at umuwi ka sa bahay mo.

5.eng: And immediately he rose up before them, and took up that whereon he lay, and departed to his own house, glorifying God.
5.tag: At pagdaka'y nagtindig siya sa harap nila, at binuhat ang kaniyang hinigan, at napasa kaniyang bahay, na niluluwalhati ang Dios.

5.eng: And they were all amazed, and they glorified God, and were filled with fear, saying, We have seen strange things to day.
5.tag: At nagsipanggilalas ang lahat at niluwalhati nila ang Dios; at nangapuspos sila ng takot, na nangagsasabi, Nakakita kami ngayon ng mga bagay na katakataka.

5.eng: And after these things he went forth, and saw a publican, named Levi, sitting at the receipt of custom: and he said unto him, Follow me.
5.tag: At pagkatapos ng mga bagay na ito, siya'y umalis, at nakita ang isang maniningil ng buwis, na nagngangalang Levi, na nakaupo sa paningilan ng buwis, at sinabi sa kaniya, Sumunod ka sa akin.

5.eng: And he left all, rose up, and followed him.
5.tag: At iniwan niya ang lahat at nagtindig at sumunod sa kaniya.

5.eng: And Levi made him a great feast in his own house: and there was a great company of publicans and of others that sat down with them.
5.tag: At siya'y ipinagpiging ng malaki ni Levi sa kaniyang bahay: at lubhang maraming maniningil ng buwis at mga iba pa na nangakasalo nila sa dulang.

5.eng: But their scribes and Pharisees murmured against his disciples, saying, Why do ye eat and drink with publicans and sinners?
5.tag: At nangagbulongbulungan ang mga Fariseo at ang kanilang mga eskriba laban sa kaniyang mga alagad, na nangagsasabi, Bakit kayo'y nagsisikain at nagsisiinom na kasalo ng mga maniningil ng buwis at ng mga makasalanan.

5.eng: And Jesus answering said unto them, They that are whole need not a physician; but they that are sick.
5.tag: At pagsagot ni Jesus ay sinabi sa kanila, Ang mga walang sakit ay hindi nangangailangan ng manggagamot; kundi ang mga may sakit.

5.eng: I came not to call the righteous, but sinners to repentance.
5.tag: Hindi ako pumarito upang tawagin ang mga matuwid, kundi ang mga makasalanan sa pagsisisi.

5.eng: And they said unto him, Why do the disciples of John fast often, and make prayers, and likewise the disciples of the Pharisees; but thine eat and drink?
5.tag: At sinabi nila sa kaniya, Ang mga alagad ni Juan ay nangagaayunong madalas, at nagsisigawa ng mga pagdaing; gayon din ang mga alagad ng mga Fariseo; datapuwa't ang mga iyo'y nagsisikain at nagsisiinom.

5.eng: And he said unto them, Can ye make the children of the bridechamber fast, while the bridegroom is with them?
5.tag: At sinabi ni Jesus sa kanila, Mangyayari bagang papagayunuhin ninyo ang mga abay sa kasalan samantalang ang kasintahang lalake ay kasama nila.

5.eng: But the days will come, when the bridegroom shall be taken away from them, and then shall they fast in those days.
5.tag: Datapuwa't darating ang mga araw; at pagka inalis sa kanila ang kasintahang lalake, kung magkagayo'y mangagaayuno sila sa mga araw na yaon.

5.eng: And he spake also a parable unto them; No man putteth a piece of a new garment upon an old; if otherwise, then both the new maketh a rent, and the piece that was taken out of the new agreeth not with the old.
5.tag: At sinalita rin naman niya sa kanila ang isang talinghaga: Walang taong pumilas sa bagong damit at itinagpi sa damit na luma; sa ibang paraa'y sisirain ang bago, at sa luma naman ay hindi bagay ang tagping mula sa bago.

5.eng: And no man putteth new wine into old bottles; else the new wine will burst the bottles, and be spilled, and the bottles shall perish.
5.tag: At walang taong nagsisilid ng alak na bago sa mga balat na luma; sa ibang paraa'y papuputukin ng alak na bago ang mga balat, at mabububo, masisira ang mga balat.

5.eng: But new wine must be put into new bottles; and both are preserved.
5.tag: Kundi dapat isilid ang alak na bago sa mga bagong balat.

5.eng: No man also having drunk old wine straightway desireth new: for he saith, The old is better.
5.tag: At walang taong nakainom ng alak na laon, ay iibig sa alak na bago; sapagka't sasabihin niya, Mabuti ang laon.

6.eng: And it came to pass on the second sabbath after the first, that he went through the corn fields; and his disciples plucked the ears of corn, and did eat, rubbing them in their hands.
6.tag: Nangyari nga nang dumaraan siya sa mga trigohan nang isang sabbath, ay kumitil ng mga uhay ang mga alagad niya, at kinakain pagkaligis sa kanilang mga kamay.

6.eng: And certain of the Pharisees said unto them, Why do ye that which is not lawful to do on the sabbath days?
6.tag: Datapuwa't sinabi ng ilan sa mga Fariseo, Bakit ginagawa ninyo ang di matuwid gawin sa araw ng sabbath.

6.eng: And Jesus answering them said, Have ye not read so much as this, what David did, when himself was an hungred, and they which were with him;
6.tag: At pagsagot sa kanila ni Jesus ay sinabi, Hindi baga nabasa ninyo ang ginawa ni David, nang siya'y magutom, siya, at ang mga kasamahan niya.

6.eng: How he went into the house of God, and did take and eat the shewbread, and gave also to them that were with him; which it is not lawful to eat but for the priests alone?
6.tag: Kung paanong siya'y pumasok sa bahay ng Dios, at kumain ng mga tinapay na handog, at binigyan pati ang kaniyang mga kasamahan; na hindi naaayon sa kautusan na kanin ninoman kundi ng mga saserdote lamang.

6.eng: And he said unto them, That the Son of man is Lord also of the sabbath.
6.tag: At sinabi niya sa kanila, Ang Anak ng tao ay panginoon ng sabbath.

6.eng: And it came to pass also on another sabbath, that he entered into the synagogue and taught: and there was a man whose right hand was withered.
6.tag: At nangyari nang ibang sabbath, na siya'y pumasok sa sinagoga at nagturo: at doo'y may isang lalake, at tuyo ang kaniyang kanang kamay.

6.eng: And the scribes and Pharisees watched him, whether he would heal on the sabbath day; that they might find an accusation against him.
6.tag: At inaabangan siya ng mga eskriba at ng mga Fariseo, kung siya'y magpapagaling sa sabbath; upang makasumpong sila ng paraan na siya'y maisakdal.

6.eng: But he knew their thoughts, and said to the man which had the withered hand, Rise up, and stand forth in the midst. And he arose and stood forth.
6.tag: Datapuwa't nalalaman niya ang kanilang mga kaisipan; at sinabi niya sa lalake na tuyo ang kamay, Magtindig ka at tumayo ka sa gitna. At siya'y nagtindig at tumayo.

6.eng: Then said Jesus unto them, I will ask you one thing; Is it lawful on the sabbath days to do good, or to do evil? to save life, or to destroy it ?
6.tag: At sinabi sa kanila ni Jesus, Itinatanong ko sa inyo, Matuwid bagang gumawa ng magaling, o gumawa ng masama kung sabbath? magligtas ng isang buhay o pumuksa.

6.eng: And looking round about upon them all, he said unto the man, Stretch forth thy hand. And he did so: and his hand was restored whole as the other.
6.tag: At minamasdan niya silang lahat sa palibotlibot, at sinabi sa kaniya, Iunat mo ang iyong kamay. At ginawa niyang gayon; at gumaling ang kaniyang kamay.

6.eng: And they were filled with madness; and communed one with another what they might do to Jesus.
6.tag: Datapuwa't sila'y nangapuno ng galit; at nangagsangusapan, kung ano ang kanilang magagawang laban kay Jesus.

6.eng: And it came to pass in those days, that he went out into a mountain to pray, and continued all night in prayer to God.
6.tag: At nangyari nang mga araw na ito, na siya'y napasa bundok upang manalangin; at sa buong magdamag ay nanatili siya sa pananalangin sa Dios.

6.eng: And when it was day, he called unto him his disciples: and of them he chose twelve, whom also he named apostles;
6.tag: At nang araw na, ay tinawag niya ang kaniyang mga alagad; at siya'y humirang ng labingdalawa sa kanila, na tinawag naman niyang mga apostol.

6.eng: Simon, (whom he also named Peter,) and Andrew his brother, James and John, Philip and Bartholomew,
6.tag: Si Simon, na tinawag naman niyang Pedro, at si Andres na kaniyang kapatid, at si Santiago at si Juan, at si Felipe at si Bartolome.

6.eng: Matthew and Thomas, James the son of Alphaeus, and Simon called Zelotes,
6.tag: At si Mateo at si Tomas, at si Santiago anak ni Alfeo, at si Simon, na tinatawag na Masikap.

6.eng: And Judas the brother of James, and Judas Iscariot, which also was the traitor.
6.tag: At si Judas na anak ni Santiago, at si Judas Iscariote na naging lilo.

6.eng: And he came down with them, and stood in the plain, and the company of his disciples, and a great multitude of people out of all Judaea and Jerusalem, and from the sea coast of Tyre and Sidon, which came to hear him, and to be healed of their diseases;
6.tag: At bumaba siya na kasama nila, at tumigil sa isang patag na dako, at ang lubhang marami sa mga alagad niya, at ang lubhang malaking bilang ng mga tao mula sa buong Judea at sa Jerusalem, at sa pangpangin ng dagat ng Tiro at Sidon, na nangagsidalo upang magsipakinig sa kaniya, at upang pagalingin sa kanilang mga sakit.

6.eng: And they that were vexed with unclean spirits: and they were healed.
6.tag: Ang mga pinahihirapan ng mga espiritung karumaldumal ay pinagagaling.

6.eng: And the whole multitude sought to touch him: for there went virtue out of him, and healed them all.
6.tag: At pinagpipilitan ng buong karamihan na siya'y mahipo; sapagka't lumalabas sa kaniya ang makapangyarihang bisa, at nagpapagaling sa lahat.

6.eng: And he lifted up his eyes on his disciples, and said, Blessed be ye poor: for yours is the kingdom of God.
6.tag: At itiningin niya ang kaniyang mga mata sa kaniyang mga alagad, at sinabi, Mapapalad kayong mga dukha: sapagka't inyo ang kaharian ng Dios.

6.eng: Blessed are ye that hunger now: for ye shall be filled. Blessed are ye that weep now: for ye shall laugh.
6.tag: Mapapalad kayong nangagugutom ngayon: sapagka't kayo'y bubusugin. Mapapalad kayong nagsisitangis ngayon: sapagka't kayo'y magsisitawa.

6.eng: Blessed are ye, when men shall hate you, and when they shall separate you from their company , and shall reproach you , and cast out your name as evil, for the Son of man's sake.
6.tag: Mapapalad kayo kung kayo'y kapootan ng mga tao, at kung kayo'y ihiwalay nila, at kayo'y alimurahin, at itakuwil ang inyong pangalan na tila masasama, dahil sa Anak ng tao.

6.eng: Rejoice ye in that day, and leap for joy: for, behold, your reward is great in heaven: for in the like manner did their fathers unto the prophets.
6.tag: Mangagalak kayo sa araw na yaon, at magsilukso kayo sa kagalakan; sapagka't narito, ang ganti sa inyo'y malaki sa langit; sapagka't sa gayon ding paraan ang ginawa ng kanilang mga magulang sa mga propeta.

6.eng: But woe unto you that are rich! for ye have received your consolation.
6.tag: Datapuwa't sa aba ninyong mayayaman! sapagka't tinanggap na ninyo ang inyong kaaliwan.

6.eng: Woe unto you that are full! for ye shall hunger. Woe unto you that laugh now! for ye shall mourn and weep.
6.tag: Sa aba ninyo mga busog ngayon! sapagka't kayo'y mangagugutom. Sa aba ninyong nagsisitawa ngayon! sapagka't kayo'y magsisitaghoy at magsisitangis.

6.eng: Woe unto you, when all men shall speak well of you! for so did their fathers to the false prophets.
6.tag: Sa aba ninyo, pagka ang lahat ng mga tao ay mangagsalita ng magaling tungkol sa inyo! sapagka't sa gayon ding paraan ang ginawa ng kanilang mga magulang sa mga bulaang propeta.

6.eng: But I say unto you which hear, Love your enemies, do good to them which hate you,
6.tag: Datapuwa't sinasabi ko sa inyong nangakikinig, Ibigin ninyo ang inyong mga kaaway, gawan ninyo ng mabuti ang nangapopoot sa inyo.

6.eng: Bless them that curse you, and pray for them which despitefully use you.
6.tag: Pagpalain ninyo ang sa inyo'y sumusumpa at ipanalangin ninyo ang sa inyo'y lumalait.

6.eng: And unto him that smiteth thee on the one cheek offer also the other; and him that taketh away thy cloke forbid not to take thy coat also.
6.tag: Sa sumampal sa iyo sa isang pisngi, iharap mo naman ang kabila; at ang sa iyo'y magalis ng iyong balabal, huwag mong itanggi pati ng iyong tunika.

6.eng: Give to every man that asketh of thee; and of him that taketh away thy goods ask them not again.
6.tag: Bigyan mo ang bawa't sa iyo'y humihingi; at sa kumuha ng pag-aari mo, ay huwag mong hinging muli.

6.eng: And as ye would that men should do to you, do ye also to them likewise.
6.tag: At kung ano ang ibig ninyong sa inyo'y gawin ng mga tao, gayon din ang gawin ninyo sa kanila.

6.eng: For if ye love them which love you, what thank have ye? for sinners also love those that love them.
6.tag: At kung kayo'y magsiibig sa mga nagsisiibig sa inyo, anong pasasalamat ang inyong kakamtin? sapagka't ang mga makasalanan man ay nagsisiibig sa nagsisiibig sa kanila.

6.eng: And if ye do good to them which do good to you, what thank have ye? for sinners also do even the same.
6.tag: At kung magsigawa kayo ng mabuti sa nagsisigawa sa inyo ng mabuti, anong pasasalamat ang inyong kakamtin? sapagka't ganito rin ang ginagawa ng mga makasalanan.

6.eng: And if ye lend to them of whom ye hope to receive, what thank have ye? for sinners also lend to sinners, to receive as much again.
6.tag: At kung kayo'y mangagpahiram doon sa mga inaasahan ninyong may tatanggapin, anong pasasalamat ang inyong kakamtin? ang mga makasalanan man ay nangagpapahiram sa mga makasalanan, upang muling magsitanggap ng gayon din.

6.eng: But love ye your enemies, and do good, and lend, hoping for nothing again; and your reward shall be great, and ye shall be the children of the Highest: for he is kind unto the unthankful and to the evil.
6.tag: Datapuwa't ibigin ninyo ang inyong mga kaaway at gawan ninyo sila ng mabuti, at mangagpahiram kayo, na kailan man ay huwag mawawalan ng pagasa; at malaki ang sa inyo'y magiging ganti, at kayo'y magiging mga anak ng Kataastaasan: sapagka't siya'y magandang-loob sa mga walang turing at sa masasama.

6.eng: Be ye therefore merciful, as your Father also is merciful.
6.tag: Magmaawain kayo, gaya naman ng inyong Ama na maawain.

6.eng: Judge not, and ye shall not be judged: condemn not, and ye shall not be condemned: forgive, and ye shall be forgiven:
6.tag: At huwag kayong mangagsihatol, at hindi kayo hahatulan: at huwag kayong mangagparusa, at hindi kayo parurusahan: mangagpalaya kayo, at kayo'y palalayain.

6.eng: Give, and it shall be given unto you; good measure, pressed down, and shaken together, and running over, shall men give into your bosom. For with the same measure that ye mete withal it shall be measured to you again.
6.tag: Mangagbigay kayo, at kayo'y bibigyan; takal na mabuti, pikpik, liglig, at umaapaw, ay ibibigay nila sa inyong kandungan. Sapagka't sa panukat na inyong isukat ay doon kayo muling susukatin.

6.eng: And he spake a parable unto them, Can the blind lead the blind? shall they not both fall into the ditch?
6.tag: At sinabi naman niya sa kanila ang isang talinghaga: Mangyayari bagang umakay ang bulag sa bulag? di baga sila mangabubulid kapuwa sa hukay.

6.eng: The disciple is not above his master: but every one that is perfect shall be as his master.
6.tag: Hindi higit ang alagad sa kaniyang guro: datapuwa't ang bawa't isa, pagka naging sakdal, ay nagiging katulad ng kaniyang guro.

6.eng: And why beholdest thou the mote that is in thy brother's eye, but perceivest not the beam that is in thine own eye?
6.tag: At bakit mo tinitingnan ang puwing na nasa mata ng iyong kapatid, datapuwa't hindi mo pinupuna ang tahilan na nasa iyong sariling mata.

6.eng: Either how canst thou say to thy brother, Brother, let me pull out the mote that is in thine eye, when thou thyself beholdest not the beam that is in thine own eye? Thou hypocrite, cast out first the beam out of thine own eye, and then shalt thou see clearly to pull out the mote that is in thy brother's eye.
6.tag: O paanong masasabi mo sa iyong kapatid, Kapatid, pabayaan mong alisin ko ang puwing na nasa iyong mata, kundi mo nakikita ang tahilan na nasa iyong sariling mata? Ikaw na mapagpaimbabaw, alisin mo muna ang tahilan na nasa iyong sariling mata, kung magkagayo'y makikita mong malinaw ang pagaalis ng puwing na nasa mata ng iyong kapatid.

6.eng: For a good tree bringeth not forth corrupt fruit; neither doth a corrupt tree bring forth good fruit.
6.tag: Sapagka't walang mabuting punong kahoy na nagbubunga ng masama; at wala rin naman masamang punong kahoy na nagbubunga ng mabuti.

6.eng: For every tree is known by his own fruit. For of thorns men do not gather figs, nor of a bramble bush gather they grapes.
6.tag: Sapagka't bawa't punong kahoy ay nakikilala sa kaniyang sariling bunga. Sapagka't ang mga tao ay di nangakapuputi ng mga igos sa mga dawag, at di nangakapuputi ng ubas sa mga tinikan.

6.eng: A good man out of the good treasure of his heart bringeth forth that which is good; and an evil man out of the evil treasure of his heart bringeth forth that which is evil: for of the abundance of the heart his mouth speaketh.
6.tag: Ang mabuting tao ay kumukuha ng kagalingan sa mabubuting kayamanan ng kaniyang puso; at ang masamang tao'y kumukuha ng kasamaan sa masamang kayamanan: sapagka't sa kasaganaan ng puso ay nagsasalita ang kaniyang bibig.

6.eng: And why call ye me, Lord, Lord, and do not the things which I say?
6.tag: At bakit tinatawag ninyo ako, Panginoon, Panginoon, at di ninyo ginagawa ang mga bagay na aking sinasabi.

6.eng: Whosoever cometh to me, and heareth my sayings, and doeth them, I will shew you to whom he is like:
6.tag: Ang bawa't lumalapit sa akin, at pinakikinggan ang aking mga salita, at ginagawa, ituturo ko sa inyo kung sino ang katulad.

6.eng: He is like a man which built an house, and digged deep, and laid the foundation on a rock: and when the flood arose, the stream beat vehemently upon that house, and could not shake it: for it was founded upon a rock.
6.tag: Siya'y tulad sa isang taong nagtatayo ng bahay, na humukay at pinakalalim, at inilagay ang patibayan sa bato: at nang dumating ang isang baha, ay hinampas ng agos ang bahay na yaon, at hindi nakilos; sapagka't natitirik na mabuti.

6.eng: But he that heareth, and doeth not, is like a man that without a foundation built an house upon the earth; against which the stream did beat vehemently, and immediately it fell; and the ruin of that house was great.
6.tag: Datapuwa't ang dumirinig, at hindi ginagawa, ay tulad sa isang tao na nagtayo ng bahay sa lupa, na walang patibayan; laban sa yaon ay hinampas ng agos, at pagdaka'y nagiba; at malaki ang naging kasiraan ng bahay na yaon.

7.eng: Now when he had ended all his sayings in the audience of the people, he entered into Capernaum.
7.tag: Nang matapos na niya ang lahat ng kaniyang mga pananalita sa mga pakinig ng bayan, ay pumasok siya sa Capernaum.

7.eng: And a certain centurion's servant, who was dear unto him, was sick, and ready to die.
7.tag: At ang alipin ng isang senturion, na minamahal nito, ay may sakit at malapit nang mamatay.

7.eng: And when he heard of Jesus, he sent unto him the elders of the Jews, beseeching him that he would come and heal his servant.
7.tag: At nang marinig niya ang tungkol kay Jesus, ay pinaparoon niya sa kaniya ang matatanda sa mga Judio, na ipamanhik sa kaniya, na pumaroon at iligtas ang kaniyang alipin.

7.eng: And when they came to Jesus, they besought him instantly, saying, That he was worthy for whom he should do this:
7.tag: At nang magsidating sila kay Jesus, ay ipinamanhik nilang mapilit sa kaniya, na sinasabi, Karapatdapat siya na gawin mo sa kaniya ito.

7.eng: For he loveth our nation, and he hath built us a synagogue.
7.tag: Sapagka't iniibig niya ang ating bansa, at ipinagtayo niya tayo ng ating sinagoga.

7.eng: Then Jesus went with them. And when he was now not far from the house, the centurion sent friends to him, saying unto him, Lord, trouble not thyself: for I am not worthy that thou shouldest enter under my roof:
7.tag: At si Jesus ay sumama sa kanila. At nang siya'y di na lubhang malayo sa bahay, ay nagsugo sa kaniya ang senturion ng mga kaibigan, na nagsisipagsabi sa kaniya, Panginoon, huwag ka nang maligalig, sapagka't di ako karapatdapat na ikaw ay pumasok sa silong ng aking bubungan.

7.eng: Wherefore neither thought I myself worthy to come unto thee: but say in a word, and my servant shall be healed.
7.tag: Dahil dito'y hindi ko inakalang ako'y karapatdapat man lamang pumariyan sa iyo: datapuwa't sabihin mo ang salita, at gagaling ang aking alipin.

7.eng: For I also am a man set under authority, having under me soldiers, and I say unto one, Go, and he goeth; and to another, Come, and he cometh; and to my servant, Do this, and he doeth it .
7.tag: Sapagka't ako rin naman ay taong nasa ilalim ng kapamahalaan, may nasasakupan akong mga kawal: at sinasabi ko rito, Yumaon ka, at siya'y yumayaon; at sa isa, Halika, at siya'y lumalapit; at sa aking alipin, Gawin mo ito, at kaniyang ginagawa.

7.eng: When Jesus heard these things, he marvelled at him, and turned him about, and said unto the people that followed him, I say unto you, I have not found so great faith, no, not in Israel.
